title: Who we are as a university?
content:
Who we are as a university?

Protecting and improving the personal and social mental health of our country in the fields of health, social, historical and cultural resources management,

Developing high quality education, training, research and application programs that dominate contemporary human and human-oriented technology,

A pioneering, exemplary universal university that provides added value and participation in regional development,

Education and training at European Union and world standards in Türkiye,

Providing education and research opportunities at international level, especially in the fields of science, health, tourism, history and cultural resources management, which will contribute to the socio-economic and cultural structure of our country,

Taking into account the natural, cultural, economic and social needs and important position of our country; with high quality education, training, research and application programs that are dominated by modern technology; which is a pioneer and an example that contributes to urban and regional development,

Developing high quality academic programs that will meet the needs of our country, using resources in the most efficient way, and carrying out scientific activities that will produce solutions to the health problems of humanity and especially our region,

We are a modern, participatory, research-oriented, science-producing university that builds on Türkiye's natural and cultural resources and utilizes the country's touristic, agricultural, social and economic assets on a national and international scale.
